sentences.target: Je cherche ma bague dans la salle de bains.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ma baɡ dɑ̃ la sal də bɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je cherche ma bague dans la salle de bains.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ma baɡ dɑ̃ la sal də bɛ̃/
translations.en: I'm looking for my ring in the bathroom.
translations.es: Estoy buscando mi anillo en el baño.
translations.de: Ich suche meinen Ring im Badezimmer.
translations.it: Sto cercando il mio anello in bagno.
translations.ru: Я ищу своё кольцо в ванной комнате.
translations.pt: Estou procurando meu anel no banheiro.
translations.he: אני מחפש את הטבעת שלי בחדר האמבטיה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm chiếc nhẫn của mình trong phòng tắm.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن خاتمي في الحمّام.
translations.nl: Ik zoek mijn ring in de badkamer.
translations.uk: Я шукаю своє кільце у ванній кімнаті.
translations.hi: मैं बाथरूम में अपनी अंगूठी ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω το δαχτυλίδι μου στο μπάνιο.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter ringen min på badet.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari cincin saya di kamar mandi.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter min ring i badrummet.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter min ring på badeværelset.
translations.ja: バスルームで指輪を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular, agreeing with 'bague'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP 'salle de bains'.
Preposition linking 'salle' to the complement 'bains'.
Common noun, masculine plural; complement of 'de' in the fixed expression 'salle de bains' (bathroom).

sentences.target: Ta bague est tombée sous le canapé.
sentences.reading: /ta baɡ ɛ tɔ̃be su lə kanape/

translations.fr: Ta bague est tombée sous le canapé.
translations.ipa: /ta baɡ ɛ tɔ̃be su lə kanape/
translations.en: Your ring fell under the couch.
translations.es: Tu anillo se cayó debajo del sofá.
translations.de: Dein Ring ist unter das Sofa gefallen.
translations.it: Il tuo anello è caduto sotto il divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的戒指掉到沙发底下了。
translations.yue: 你隻戒指跌咗喺梳化底度。
translations.pt: Seu anel caiu embaixo do sofá.
translations.vi: Nhẫn của bạn rơi xuống dưới gầm ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Je ring is onder de bank gevallen.
translations.hu: A gyűrűd beesett a kanapé alá.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी अंगूठी सोफ़े के नीचे गिर गई.
translations.el: Το δαχτυλίδι σου έπεσε κάτω από τον καναπέ.
translations.ro: Inelul tău a căzut sub canapea.
translations.da: Din ring faldt ned under sofaen.
translations.ja: あなたの指輪がソファの下に落ちた。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular, agreeing with 'bague'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle 'tombée'.
Past participle, feminine singular, of intransitive verb 'tomber'; agrees with the subject 'bague' with auxiliary 'être'.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'canapé'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: On fait graver la bague demain.

translations.fr: On fait graver la bague demain.
translations.en: We're getting the ring engraved tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana vamos a mandar grabar el anillo.
translations.de: Wir lassen den Ring morgen gravieren.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天要把戒指拿去刻字。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日攞隻戒指去刻字。
translations.ru: Завтра мы отнесём кольцо на гравировку.
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos mandar gravar o anel.
translations.he: מחר אנחנו נביא את הטבעת לחריטה.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi sẽ mang nhẫn đi khắc.
translations.nl: Morgen laten we de ring graveren.
translations.uk: Завтра ми віднесемо кільце на гравіювання.
translations.hi: हम कल अंगूठी पर नक्काशी करवाएंगे.
translations.el: Αύριο θα πάμε το δαχτυλίδι για χάραξη.
translations.nb: I morgen skal vi levere ringen til gravering.
translations.id: Besok kami akan membawa cincin itu untuk diukir.
translations.sv: I morgon ska vi lämna in ringen för gravyr.
translations.da: I morgen får vi ringen graveret.
translations.ja: 明日、指輪を刻印してもらいます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject (colloquially 'we').
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; causative construction with infinitive 'graver'.
Infinitive verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of causative 'faire'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'bague'.
Common noun, feminine singular; patient/direct object of 'graver' in the causative.
Temporal adverb indicating time of the action.

sentences.target: Je dois enlever ma bague pour cuisiner.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa ɑ̃leve ma baɡ puʁ kɥizine/

translations.fr: Je dois enlever ma bague pour cuisiner.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa ɑ̃leve ma baɡ puʁ kɥizine/
translations.en: I have to take off my ring to cook.
translations.es: Tengo que quitarme el anillo para cocinar.
translations.de: Ich muss meinen Ring zum Kochen abnehmen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我得把戒指摘下来做饭。
translations.yue: 我煮嘢食要除低隻戒指。
translations.ru: Мне нужно снять кольцо, чтобы готовить.
translations.pt: Tenho que tirar meu anel para cozinhar.
translations.he: אני צריך להוריד את הטבעת כדי לבשל.
translations.tr: Yemek yapmak için yüzüğümü çıkarmam gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi phải tháo nhẫn ra để nấu ăn.
translations.nl: Ik moet mijn ring afdoen om te koken.
translations.uk: Мені треба зняти кільце, щоб готувати.
translations.hu: Főzéshez le kell vennem a gyűrűmet.
translations.hi: मुझे खाना बनाने के लिए अपनी अंगूठी उतारनी होगी.
translations.el: Πρέπει να βγάλω το δαχτυλίδι μου για να μαγειρέψω.
translations.nb: Jeg må ta av ringen min for å lage mat.
translations.id: Saya harus melepas cincin saya untuk memasak.
translations.sv: Jag måste ta av mig ringen för att laga mat.
translations.ro: Trebuie să-mi dau jos inelul ca să gătesc.
translations.cs: Musím si na vaření sundat prsten.
translations.da: Jeg er nødt til at tage min ring af for at lave mad.
translations.fi: Minun täytyy ottaa sormus pois ruoanlaittoa varten.
translations.ja: 料理するために指輪を外さなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects infinitive 'enlever'.
Infinitive main verb governed by the modal 'devoir'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular, agreeing with 'bague'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'enlever'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a purpose infinitival clause.
Infinitive verb; purpose clause complement introduced by 'pour'.
